fields.description: AI provider used by all AI nodes unless overridden on the node itself.
fields.label: Default AI Provider
fields.options:
Anthropic
OpenAI
Google Gemini
Ollama
OpenRouter

fields.description: Default model for the selected provider. Leave blank to use the provider's recommended default (claude-sonnet-4-5 / gpt-4o / gemini-1.5-pro / llama3.1).
fields.label: Default Model

fields.description: Maximum tool-use iterations the Auto Agent node will run before bailing out.
fields.label: Max Agent Iterations

fields.description: Anthropic API key for Claude models (claude-sonnet-4-5, claude-opus-4, etc.). Stored encrypted.
fields.label: Anthropic API Key

fields.description: OpenAI API key for GPT models (gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, etc.). Stored encrypted.
fields.label: OpenAI API Key

fields.description: Google Gemini API key for Gemini models (gemini-1.5-pro, gemini-1.5-flash, etc.). Stored encrypted.
fields.label: Google Gemini API Key

fields.description: Base URL of your local Ollama server. Used when provider is set to Ollama. No API key required.
fields.label: Ollama Base URL

fields.description: OpenRouter API key — gives access to 200+ models (Claude, GPT, Llama, Mistral, etc.) via a single key. Stored encrypted. Get yours at openrouter.ai.
fields.label: OpenRouter API Key

fields.description: WhatsApp provider used by all WhatsApp nodes. Configure credentials for the chosen provider below.
fields.label: WhatsApp Provider

fields.description: Phone Number ID from Meta Developer Console (not the phone number itself). Required for Meta Cloud API.
fields.label: Phone Number ID

fields.description: Permanent access token from Meta Developer Console. Stored encrypted. Required for Meta Cloud API.
fields.label: Meta Access Token

fields.description: Base URL of your WaClient / WPPConnect server (e.g. http://localhost:3000). Required for WaClient.
fields.label: WaClient Endpoint

fields.description: WaClient session name (the session you started with wppconnect-server). Required for WaClient.
fields.label: WaClient Session Name

fields.description: WaClient secret key (set in wppconnect-server config). Stored encrypted. Leave blank if authentication is disabled.
fields.label: WaClient Secret Key

fields.description: Hard ceiling on how many node executions a single run can perform. Protects against runaway loops.
fields.label: Max Steps per Run

fields.description: Default per-node timeout in seconds. Individual nodes can override.
fields.label: Default Node Timeout (sec)

fields.description: Workflow Runs and their step traces are purged after this many days. Set to 0 to keep forever.
fields.label: Run Retention (days)

fields.description: Shared secret used to sign incoming webhook requests. Append &token=<secret> to webhook URLs, or send as X-FlowAgent-Token header.
fields.label: Webhook Secret

fields.description: Log every doc-event dispatch decision to bench logs (tail with `bench logs -f`). Useful when a workflow won't fire and you can't figure out why. Turn off in production.
fields.label: Verbose Logging
